data.body: PASS 1 review (Cluster 1, G1G2 edit-set/scope). All five named edit targets verified to exist: `_store/canonical.py` (canonical_str/canonical_bytes), `signing.py::_canonical_payload`, `llm/workflow/schema.py::canonical_json`/`content_hash` (+ re-exported in `llm/workflow/__init__.py::__all__`), `conflict_resolver.py::_hash_value`, `mutation.py::serialize_manifest`. One byte-preservation gap surfaced (conflict_resolver needs `ascii_only=True` as well as `default=str`) plus a couple consumer-enumeration nits — see structured findings.
